text.title: Cross-Tool Migration Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Migration declared done without row-count verification.
antipattern.fix: Run count-check.py; block cutover on drift.

antipattern.symptom: Custom field dropped silently during migration.
antipattern.root-cause: field present in source schema, absent in target
antipattern.fix: Add to mapping table as 'dropped' with sign-off.

antipattern.symptom: Migration run directly on production without staging trial.
